title: Crunchy Sweet Sherry Quinoa Stir-fry
description: This savory and crunchy dish combines the richness of sweet sherry with fluffy quinoa in a light, romantic twist suitable for vegetarians.

ingredients.name: sherry sauce base
ingredients.notes: reduced and sweetened with honey or sugar

instructions: Preheat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add oil and swirl to coat.
Add onions, garlic, and celery to the hot pan, cooking until softened, about 5 minutes.
Toss in carrots and continue cooking for another minute until they start to soften but still retain their crunch.
Pour in sherry sauce base while stirring quickly to prevent burning. Let it reduce slightly, adding salt and pepper to taste.
Add rinsed quinoa to the pan and stir well with everything else. Cook for about 2 minutes allowing the flavors to meld together.
Turn off heat and serve immediately.
